name: Fidelity Ethereum Fund
business: The Trust is an exchange-traded product that issues shares of beneficial interest that trade on the Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc. The Trust's investment objective is to seek to track the performance of ether, as measured by the performance of the Index, adjusted for the Trust's expenses and other liabilities. The Trust holds ether and values its Shares daily based on the same methodology used to calculate the Index.

exposures.sentence: The Trust's investment objective is to seek to track the performance of ether, as measured by the performance of the Index, adjusted for the Trust's expenses and other liabilities.
